name: Diligent Board Governance & GRC API
what_it_does: Diligent REST API for board governance, GRC, and integrated risk management platform. Enables AI agents to manage board meeting materials and document workflows, access board director and committee data, retrieve audit and risk management data, handle ESG reporting and sustainability metrics, manage compliance program data, access entity and subsidiary management records, integrate governance data with legal and financial systems, and connect board-level information with enterprise risk frameworks.
use_cases: Managing board meeting materials and director workflows from governance automation agents
Retrieving audit findings and risk data from enterprise risk management agents
Accessing ESG metrics and sustainability reporting from compliance agents
Integrating entity and subsidiary data from legal entity management agents
not_for: Small businesses without formal board governance requirements
Operational compliance without board-level governance and director management
Public company without SEC disclosure and proxy governance focus
best_when: A public company, large private company, or regulated institution using Diligent wants AI agents to automate board material distribution, audit management, risk reporting, ESG metrics, and entity management workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Board materials and director communications are highly confidential and may be subject to attorney-client privilege. Audit findings and risk assessments are sensitive business information. ESG data has growing regulatory disclosure requirements (SEC climate rules).

auth.notes: Diligent uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with governance, audit, and risk scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Enterprise integration program for connectors. Acquired multiple GRC and governance companies (Galvanize, Acclivity, BoardEffect).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — board governance enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and per-module enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: New York City. Founded 2001 as Diligent Board Member Services. Major board governance and GRC platform. 700,000+ directors and executives. Acquired Galvanize (ACL), Acclivity, BoardEffect, and others. Market leader for board portals globally. NYSE-listed until 2021 (taken private by Insight Partners).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Board materials may be attorney-client privileged — handle with highest confidentiality
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with enterprise partner program
No webhooks — polling required for governance and audit updates
ESG data growing regulatory scrutiny — SEC climate disclosure rules affect data accuracy requirements
Multi-acquisition platform — Galvanize (audit) and BoardEffect (board portal) have separate API surfaces
Director and executive communications are under insider trading and securities law scrutiny
agent_readiness.security_notes: Board governance and executive data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Attorney-client privilege. Securities law compliance. Highest confidentiality.

security_score_components.security_notes: Board governance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Privilege and securities law. Highest confidentiality.
